description_long: This object is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a moderately thick bezel. The front surface is dominated by a dark, glossy screen, while the rear features a textured panel with horizontal ventilation grooves and a few visible screws at the corners. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, octagonal pedestal stand that connects to the center of the rear panel, providing stability. The side profile reveals a slim, slightly tapered body, with the thickest section near the base and a gentle curve toward the top. No physical buttons, ports, or branding are visible on any side of the monitor. The overall appearance is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for office or public urban environments.
description: A sleek, flat-panel computer monitor with a dark screen, thick bezel, and a sturdy octagonal pedestal stand. The rear panel is textured with horizontal grooves and no visible buttons or logos.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the slim, slightly tapered profile and the central attachment of the octagonal pedestal stand.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals a textured back panel with horizontal grooves, corner screws, and the full octagonal stand base.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to view 0, highlighting the monitor's thin profile and the stand's attachment.
description_view_3: The front view displays the wide, dark screen framed by a thick bezel and the octagonal stand base centered below.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with slightly rounded corners and a smooth, untextured finish. It frames the display area evenly on all sides with no decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a solid, octagonal pedestal base made of matte black material, connecting centrally to the rear of the monitor. It appears robust and stable, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
